title: DSK Legal acts on Eris Lifesciences acquiring Velbiom's probiotics business
description: Velbiom Probiotics Private Limited has made a transfer of its branded prescription-based probiotics business to Eris Lifesciences Limited on a slump sale basis, for a consideration of ₹50 crore.DSK Legal assisted and advised Velbiom Probiotics on this transaction. The Firm's scope of work included drafting, reviewing, revising, negotiating and finalizing the business transfer agreement, trademark assignment deed, and ancillary documents required to consummate the Transaction; and assis
